data.title: Next Level Apparel x Got Sole Announce 2026 Partnership as Official Apparel Partner for U.S. Culture Festival Series
data.description: Next Level Apparel has been announced as the official apparel partner for Got Sole's upcoming 2026 U.S. tour. This partnership is set to bring premium blank apparel to the forefront of the sneaker and streetwear live customization marketplace. The California-based company, Next Level Apparel, known for its high-quality wholesale products, has secured this collaboration. The announcement was made on July 1, 2026, in Torrance, California. The partnership aims to tap into the growing market of customizable streetwear and sneakers during the tour.

data.title: Idaho Copper Corporation Announces Pricing of $18 Million Public Offering and NYSE American Listing
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, on July 01, 2026, Idaho Copper Corporation disclosed the pricing details of their underwritten public offering. The company, listed as (NYSE American: COPR, COPR WS), is involved in critical minerals development with a focus on the CuMo copper-molybdenum-silver project in Idaho. The offering involved common stock and warrants set at $4.85 per share, generating around $18,000,000 in gross proceeds. This amount is before any deductions for underwriting discounts and offering expenses. Additionally, Idaho Copper has provided the underwriters with a 45-day option to gain up to 556,800 more shares of common stock and/or warrants to cater for any over-allotments that may arise during the process.

data.title: Vertex Announces US FDA Approval for Expanded Use of CASGEVY® for the Treatment of People Ages 2 Years and Older With Sickle Cell Disease or Transfusion-Dependent Beta Thalassemia
data.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the green light for expanded use of CASGEVY® (exagamglogene autotemcel) to treat individuals aged 2 years and above with sickle cell disease (SCD) exhibiting recurring vaso-occlusive crises (VOCs) or transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia (TDT). Notably, CASGEVY stands as the inaugural sanctioned genetic therapy intended for kids as young as 2 years facing either SCD or TDT.

data.title: Gold Coast Health Plan Celebrates 15 Years of Growth and Impact in Serving Ventura County's Medi-Cal Members
data.description: Gold Coast Health Plan (GCHP) in Camarillo, California is commemorating 15 years of offering integrated healthcare services to the most at-risk residents of Ventura County. Since its establishment in July 1, 2011, GCHP has been dedicated to connecting Medi-Cal beneficiaries with top-notch care and resources.

data.title: BBHW Supports DEA Scheduling of 7-OH and Three Related Drugs is an Important Step to Take Dangerous, Synthetic Products Off of the Market
data.description: In a recent announcement, the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) revealed the official placement of 7-hydroxymitragynine (7-OH) and three synthetic substances - pseudoindoxyl, MGM15, and MGM16, onto Schedule I of the Controlled Substances Act. This decision, supported by Botanicals for Better Health and Wellness (BBHW), emphasizes aligning regulation with scientific understanding. By taking this action, the DEA aims to address potential risks associated with these substances. This move is significant as it underscores the agency's commitment to safeguarding public health and safety, sending a clear message to consumers in the United States.

data.title: Faraday Future Showcases its EAI Robotics Education Ecosystem at ISTE Live 2026 in Orlando, Drawing Strong Interest from Major North American Education Distributors and Procurement Leaders
data.description: A California-based global Embodied AI (EAI) ecosystem company, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) recently participated in ISTE Live 2026 in Orlando, the largest education technology conference in North America. During the event, FF highlighted its latest robotics developments and strengthened partnerships with K–12 schools, educational institutions, FF Par partners, developers, and ecosystem partners, emphasizing collaboration. Faraday Future's engagement at the event aimed to leverage the platform for showcasing innovation and networking with key stakeholders in the education sector.
RBNZ names Angus McGregor assistant governor for financial stability

data.title: Trump team boosts sales for kratom allies by banning synthetic version, benefitting makers of rival supplements.
data.description: The decision to prohibit a strong synthetic form of kratom by the president's administration has inadvertently opened up new opportunities for manufacturers of competing botanical supplements. These companies, which had actively pushed for this ban, are now set to benefit from increased sales.

data.title: OLIVE YOUNG Brings Signature K-Beauty Festival to the U.S. with OLIVE YOUNG FESTA LA 2026
data.description: Today, OLIVE YOUNG, the top beauty and lifestyle retailer in Korea, announced the launch of its first U.S. edition in Los Angeles on July 1, 2026. The event will showcase 55 Korean beauty and lifestyle brands, offering interactive experiences and personalized beauty services in a comprehensive K-beauty playground. This innovative concept aims to provide a unique and immersive experience for beauty enthusiasts in the U.S.

data.title: Dnotitia Unveils STAR-KV, Achieving UP to 20x KV Cache Compression, Selected as an ICML 2026 Spotlight Paper
data.description: A new method has been unveiled to compress KV cache, a crucial bottleneck in long-context AI tasks, using a low-rank approach. This innovation hastens attention computation by a notable 6.9 times and boosts overall generation throughput by up to 3.1 times. Besides enhancing memory efficiency, the approach significantly accelerates inference processes. The research has garnered recognition by being chosen as a Spotlight paper at the prestigious ICML conference.

data.title: W. Scott Stornetta, a Founding Father of Blockchain, Joins SafeBets as Chair of the Advisory Council
data.description: A leading figure in the development of early blockchain technology, W. Scott Stornetta, has been appointed to oversee the implementation of verified identity standards, transparency, and public auditability at SafeBets. SafeBets, the innovative zero-wager prediction platform that allows users to Win Without Risk, made the announcement today. Stornetta, who co-invented the early blockchain system, will play a crucial role in ensuring the integrity and security of the platform. Founded on July 1, 2026, SafeBets continues to prioritize user trust and cybersecurity under the guidance of Stornetta.

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund Provides Unaudited Balance Sheet Information and Announces Its Net Asset Value and Asset Coverage Ratios as of June 30, 2026
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: KYN) disclosed its unaudited assets and liabilities summary along with the net asset value and asset coverage ratios as of June 30, 2026.

data.title: Viking Acquisition Corp. II prices $200M IPO launch.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations and showing a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was reported at 3.5%, indicating a strong and stable economic performance. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting continued growth and improvement in the overall employment situation.

data.title: Bayer Group to Consolidate U.S. Glyphosate Business Into Distinct Entity Operating as Ruveon
data.description: Bayer Group has consolidated its U.S. glyphosate business into Ruveon LLC, based in St. Louis, Missouri. This move aims to optimize operations for the U.S. market. Ruveon will oversee all aspects of the U.S. glyphosate sector, including pricing, go-to-market strategies, production, and logistics. The change signifies Ruveon's sole responsibility for the U.S. glyphosate business within the Bayer Group. This consolidation reflects Bayer's commitment to aligning operations efficiently and effectively for the market's needs in the U.S.

data.title: Siddharth Mittal Appointed as Managing Director & CEO of Syngene International
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, on July 2, 2026, Syngene International disclosed that Siddharth Mittal has become the Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of the organization. Syngene International is a prominent global CRDMO. This change in leadership became effective on July 1.
